creator: jdp@polstra.com
text:
In doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/dev-model/book.sgml, the CVSup Mirror Site
Coordinator hat is shown as currently held by me.  That info is several
years out-of date.  The proper email address for this hat is
<cvsup-master@FreeBSD.org>.  I have attached a patch to fix the
document.
